title: purchase-history-{OptionId}.request
description:
Dynamic endpoint pattern: purchase-history-{OptionId}

Request for a purchase history import from a supplier using a specified option

accountId.description: The main account identifier for the supplier

customIdentifierFields.description:
A collection of identifiers specific to the Vendor.
These were either previously returned by the vendor, or configured by the user based on vendor-specific inputs

callbackData.description: Generic data that is specified by the previous request's CallbackInfo

optionId.description:
Option identifier for the purchase history selection
Specified by the OptionId from the VendorPurchaseHistoryOptionsResponse

values.description: Additional values/parameters for the purchase history option selected by the user
